infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: The Ritual uses your camera to capture photo proof of completed habits.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: The Ritual uses your location to verify check-ins for location-based habits.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: The Ritual uses your location to verify check-ins for location-based habits.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: The Ritual saves habit proof photos to your Photos library when you choose to.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: The Ritual lets you pick existing photos as proof for your habits.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: The Ritual uses Face ID to unlock the app and protect your data.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your camera to capture photo proof of completed habits.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to verify check-ins for location-based habits.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to pick existing photos as habit proof.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to save habit proof photos to your Photos library.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to unlock the app with Face ID.
